action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 8 ran combined train+val with mixup+LS+cosine for 4 epochs. Val acc 0.583 on noisy held-out, but I didn't submit eval. Best test eval so far is 0.7743 (iter 2: ConvNeXt-Tiny 3 epochs CE at 160px). Analysis: With 40% noise, training too long memorizes noise. Key insight: simpler/shorter training works better. The current best.pt is from iter 8 - need to submit eval to see. Or better: try a fundamentally stronger approach. CLIP ViT-B/16 features are very strong - should beat ConvNeXt with proper recipe. Let me try ensemble of two models or use a sample selection approach. Decision: Submit eval for current iter 8 checkpoint to compare, then decide next steps.
